trans-unit.target: Searchingway here, with an exciting announcement: we are now officially prepared for interstellar travel! Contributors who would like to visit another star should report to me forthwith.
Attention: preparations to hop forth from Phaenna have concluded, so all those interested in further interstellar travel should report to Searchingway! (That's me!)
At last, we are prepared to leap from Oizys unto a new frontier! All contributors eager to contribute upon another star should report to your humble servant, Searchingway.
